Alpha Brate. Provider of CSGO STATUS, AlphaX platform service. Founded in August 2020 as XchuangC. May 2022 Renamed Alpha Brate and changed to a public organization. Everyone is welcome to join us. Everything is open source.

 The design of the website has been renewed and improved. More beautiful, more in line with modern design language, more convenient. You can view the old website here.

 Our philosophy is to provide as many free services as possible to everyone. Our aim is to provide users with quality service. Our obligation is to give users a good user experience.

View your Steam and CSGO stats.

Debug your JavaScript Code online.

Get user feedback!
